indexes._comment_: Mobile profile page — submissions tab. Filter by submitter + status, ordered newest-first. Used by lib/features/profile/.../profile_page.dart's _SubmissionsTab.

Mobile 'Added by you' chip — UserSubmissionsCubit listens to a user's approved submissions to populate the place-id set. Filter by submitter + status (no orderBy, but Firestore still needs the composite for two equality filters when status comparison is also indexed).
Admin dashboard /omar-dash listSubmissions — filter by status, ordered newest-first. Used by src/server/dashboard/admin-actions.js#listSubmissions.
Admin dashboard /omar-dash listReports — filter by status, ordered newest-first. Used by src/server/dashboard/admin-queries.js#listReports.
Admin dashboard /omar-dash listInquiries — filter by status, ordered newest-first. Used by src/server/dashboard/admin-queries.js#listInquiries.
Admin dashboard listPlaces — filter by source_categories (array-contains) + order by title. Used by src/server/dashboard/admin-queries.js#listPlaces.
